questions.q: Driven largely by surging exports of oil and what other commodity, did Statistics Canada report the country swinging to its first trade surplus in six months in May 2026?
On May 6, 2026, Türkiye unveiled the 'Yildirimhan', a new intercontinental ballistic missile reportedly capable of reaching what top speed?
The World Health Organization initiated contact tracing on May 6, 2026, for over 80 passengers on a flight from Saint Helena to Johannesburg due to exposure to which virus?
Reported on May 6, 2026, U.S. President Donald Trump announced a temporary pause on what military operation designed to escort commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz?
Which state's Secretary of State announced in May 2026 that the state had shared sensitive voter registration data with the U.S. Department of Justice to comply with federal law?
Which historic all-women's college faced a federal Title IX investigation in May 2026 over its policy of admitting transgender women?
In May 2026, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) proposed allowing publicly traded companies to opt out of filing which type of reports?
As reported on May 6, 2026, U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio confirmed the end of the offensive stage of the Iran war, a military campaign officially codenamed what?
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy declared a unilateral ceasefire starting at midnight on May 6, 2026, ahead of which nation's Victory Day commemorations?
In May 2026, which Canadian telecommunications company was reported to be using AI to artificially alter the accents of its customer-service agents?
